Deliverables: 1) Brand messaging framework with value propositions for each persona (solo practitioners, small firms, mid-market), 2) Content marketing strategy (blog topics, whitepapers, video scripts), 3) Digital marketing playbook (SEO keywords, SEM campaigns, LinkedIn strategy), 4) Launch campaign timeline (pre-launch, launch week, post-launch activities), 5) PR strategy with media targets and press release templates, 6) Website copy and landing page wireframes (hero, features, pricing, demo request). Reference Phase 2 brand identity and Phase 3 competitive analysis. Store all in ~/openclaw-core/data/phase4/
